Name: TankWheelParam
Description: Defines parameters relaed to tank wheels.

Fields.Name: Attachment Position (X)
Fields.Description: X-axis wheel attachment position, in meters

Fields.Name: Attachment Position (Y)
Fields.Description: Y-axis wheel attachment position, in meters

Fields.Name: Attachment Position (Z)
Fields.Description: Z-axis wheel attachment position, in meters

Fields.Name: Wheel Radius
Fields.Description: Radius of the wheel, in meters

Fields.Name: Suspension Length
Fields.Description: Length of the suspension, in meters

Fields.Name: Rebound Strength
Fields.Description: Strength at which the spring attempts to return to its original length when compressed

Fields.Name: Retraction Strength
Fields.Description: Strength at which the spring attempts to return to its original length when stretched
